title: mysql8.4 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[8.4.8-1]
- Rebase to 8.4.8

[8.4.7-2]
- Skip tests that are failing on Konflux
- Resolves: ROK-831
full_text:
